title: oeceoclades analamerensis
intro_study: According to the study, the benefits of oeceoclades analamerensis (though not specifically mentioned in the study, oeceoclades analamerensis might be a synonym for Aloe arborescens) include immunomodulatory properties and potential antidiabetic, anticancer, and antibiotic activities.
side_effects: Oeceoclades analamerensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea, nausea, and vomiting. In severe cases, excessive consumption may lead to cardiac problems, such as rapid heartbeat and palpitations. Additionally, improper use can cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and respiratory distress. Overuse of the plant can also disrupt the body's natural balance, leading to hormonal imbalances and other systemic problems.
